response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings 17+ years of broad software engineering experience and holds Staff-level titles, with solid TypeScript/Node.js depth and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) starting April 2025. However, the role's non-negotiable core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions is not met — his AI-adjacent work totals roughly 13 months. Python is entirely absent from his skills and history, RAG architectures, vector databases, LLMs, and multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI) are never mentioned, and his data-pipeline work predates the GenAI era, leaving the most critical technical pillars of this role undemonstrated.
strengths: 17+ years of software engineering experience with Staff-level titles across multiple organizations, signaling demonstrated seniority and technical leadership capability
Hands-on involvement with MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure in his current role at re:cinq
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record through public workshops, conference talks, and community-driven coding dojos
concerns: Critically insufficient AI/GenAI depth: approximately 13 months of AI-adjacent work against the mandatory 8+ years of production AI solution delivery
Python is completely absent from the resume and skills list, yet it is the primary language cited in the job description and key technologies
No evidence of experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation/optimization, or named multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI
